# Required GitHub Secrets for Release Workflow

| Secret | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY` | Tauri updater private key (base64) |
| `TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD` | Tauri updater private key password |
| `SMEMASTER_KEYSTORE_PATH` | Path to Android keystore in CI |
| `SMEMASTER_STORE_PASSWORD` | Android keystore password |
| `SMEMASTER_KEY_ALIAS` | Android key alias |
| `SMEMASTER_KEY_PASSWORD` | Android key password |
